name: 1Huddle
description: Developer of a game-based workforce training platform designed to onboard, upskill, and develop employees. The company's platform converts boring training material into competitive games that are proven to improve employee engagement and performance, enabling businesses to carry out sales and service training and education programs for their employees in a fun and interactive way.

name: Aeon B
description: Developer of Electronic Records Management (ERM) solution tailored specifically for dermatology and plastic surgery clinics in South Korea.

name: AESOP
description: Developer of AI Enhanced SOlutions for Physicians (AESOP) designed to create decision support for physicians that improves healthcare quality and safety, and that makes billing related documentation easier using machine learning run on many patient visits. The company's technology offers decision support and reporting that flags inappropriate prescriptions, where the medications prescribed do not match the diagnosis, age, and gender of the patient, enabling users to enhance patient safety and medical billing accuracy.

name: At-Home-Doc
description: Developer of a mobile-based medical platform designed to offer medical services at home. The company's platform is a home doctor service application that offers doctors, medications and laboratories anytime anywhere in less than 90-minutes, enabling patients and their family members to pick medical services as per requirement and get 24/7 healthcare consultation services at home.

name: Aumet
description: Developer of a B2B healthcare platform designed to support healthcare providers with their business decisions and performance. The company's platform aims to promote healthcare companies acquire the products and services on the market, and access essential information for critical business decisions, enabling clients to bridge the gaps in the healthcare industry by digitalizing the ordering process between, suppliers and healthcare providers.

name: Avioneta
description: Provider of healthcare services intended to help patients get rid of their alcohol addiction. The company offers a monthly subscription program that accompanies the consumer or their loved one through different services, as they progress with the program, they are able to have a healthier relationship with alcohol under measurable success criteria, providing patients with information based on science and medicine in a fresh, dignified and respectful way to control their alcohol addiction.

name: Bariendo
description: Developer of an obesity management platform intended to provide a comprehensive suite of treatments, combining both medication and next-generation endoscopic interventions. The company's physician-supervised approach combined with remote monitoring technology sets a new benchmark in obesity care to accelerate the adoption of advanced obesity interventions, enabling patients to achieve their weight loss goals.

name: BillionToOne
description: Developer of a molecular counter platform intended to increase the resolution of cell-free DNA testing. The company's pan-cancer tumor-naive oncology test precisely quantifies tumor burden from a blood sample to track response to therapy and its prenatal testing procedure focuses on quantitative biology and statistical learning methods to optimize the signal-to-noise ratio and detect single-gene disorders, enabling expecting mothers to detect disorders such as sickle-cell disease, beta-thalassemia, spinal muscular atrophy, and cystic fibrosis through a simple blood test.

name: Chefaa
description: Developer of an on-demand medicine delivery platform designed to connect patients with local pharmacies. The company's platform utilizes artificial intelligence, GPS-enabled, data-driven app to help users order, schedule pharmacy needs, save cost, to better serve patients comprehensively for better patients' compliance with improved accessibility & affordability, thereby enabling consumers to receive medicines with minimal effort and waiting periods.

name: Clinikk
description: Developer of a digital healthcare platform designed to make quality medical care accessible and affordable to neo-middle-class Indians. The company's platform including services like consultation, diagnostics tests, and EMR with doctors available around the clock and affordable health plans, enabling customers to get affordable and accessible services on demand.

name: Coolso
description: Developer of a gesture technology intended to focus on muscle biosensors integrating augmented reality and virtual reality. The company's technology recognizes detailed information such as muscle fatigue, gesture, and strength level, enabling clients to get wearable gesture control and rehabilitation remedies.

name: X mart
description: Developer of an online dental marketplace platform designed to sell dental supplies and materials. The company's platform offers a wide variety of dental tools and equipment from trusted vendors and agents, enabling dentists and dental clinic managers to access all dental supplies, equipment, and services online.

name: Doc Doc
description: Press a button and connect with pediatricians, psychologists, nutritionists, and veterinarians in less than ⚡️ 10 seconds

name: ElCoach
description: Developer of a fitness and nutrition application designed to offer personalized body transformation programs based on individual needs. The company's application offers current stats, fitness levels, and personal goals that are used for customized diet and workout programs that offer tools and food tables to follow the instructions and calculate the progress of the training, enabling users to track their fitness and to get diet and exercise from anywhere, at any time.

name: Hykso
description: Developer of a wearable motion tracker designed to monitor and view a fighter's punch output in real-time. The company's tracker tracks a hand's movement several times per second to detect the number, type, and velocity of all the punches, and its application permits measuring daily, weekly, and monthly progression, enabling fighters to compare their speed, punch count, and intensity compared to other fighters to better know their strengths and weaknesses.

name: Flexpa
description: Developer of a healthcare platform designed to ensure better outcomes through the use of diagnostic tests and lab reports. The company's product digitizes collected data from disparate hardware providers, interprets it, and then creates analytics dashboards to see how both individual patients and groups of patients are doing, enabling healthcare providers to determine treatment plans and pharmaceutical options for patients.

name: Fyodor Biotechnologies
description: Developer of a non-invasive malaria testing technology designed to deliver a simple system to major global health problems. The company's technology helps people with a fever to diagnose malaria using a few drops of urine instead of blood, enabling healthcare professionals to help patients diagnose malaria conveniently and minimize pain and blood loss.

name: Gesund
description: Federated Learning platform geared for the healthcare vertical providing the infrastructure so that research partners can build their AI algorithms on top of the platform ensuring compliance with data standards.

name: Glance care
description: Developer of a crowdsourced software testing platform designed to provide access to testers and devices. The company's platform connects software testers with businesses to provide development of mobile apps, games, and websites for bugs, security, and UX/UI issues, enabling software companies to outsource testing and launch better apps with fewer bugs at an affordable price.

name: Healf
description: Provider of financial services intended for major medical expense insurance. The company offers to pay up to 90% of the refundable amount and take care of the process with the insurer, enabling clients to focus on their recovery.

founders.name: Federico Fernandez de la Regata Torres

name: Innovaccer
description: Developer of a data activation platform designed to assist healthcare organizations to activate their data silos. The company's platform aggregates analyzes and activates patient data, enabling healthcare organizations to have patient insights right in the moment of care and offer each patient private, customized care with suitable plans, a dedicated team, and outcome-focused goals.

name: Instabeat
description: Developer of goggle-mounted sensor products designed to enhance swimming performance in real time. The company offers swimming goggles that capture real-time heart rate, stroke detection, laps and instant heart rate information that are presented through a mobile application, enabling swimmers to get accurate information related to their performance and their improvement insights after training.

name: Jade Autism
description: Developer of therapeutic validation games designed to help children and adolescents with cognitive disabilities. The company's games offer data science, constant updates, reporting, and behavior analysis, enabling users to stimulate visual performance, attention, receptive language, and mathematical logical reasoning through games.

name: Manage BGL
description: Developer of a diabetes dose management application designed to manage insulin levels. The company's technology fuses the useful features of insulin devices and data logging apps, enabling patients to control and effectively forecast blood glucose levels hours in advance.

name: Karaz Platform
description: Developer of a diabetic health monitoring platform intended to simplify, gamify, and personalize health within the supportive community. The company's platform provides diabetic supplies, telemedicine, personalized diabetic coaching, and support needed to take an active approach toward good health, enabling users to easily manage their diabetes by adjusting and monitoring their blood sugar, nutrition, medication, and physical activity and helping them live a better life.

name: Labayh
description: Operator of a psychological care platform that provides well-being and mental health services. The company's platform connects users with licensed psychologists and psychiatrists through its mobile application, to offer consultations related to different problems that affect their mental health, enabling users to connect with doctors and receive advice for their health issues.

name: LucidAct
description: Developer of an enterprise platform intended to expedite healthcare management. The company's platform leverages artificial intelligence to offer chronic care management, insurance checklist automation, and remote patient tracking management, enabling healthcare professionals to manage more patients and facilitate their operations.

name: Massive Bio
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-driven platform intended to connect cancer patients to biopharmaceutical clinical trials. The company offers tech-enabled services and a big data platform that addresses the clinical trial enrollment value chain by providing patient identification, pre-screening, and concierge enrollment enablement while being focused on oncology and innovative data, technology, and services, enabling patients to get an effective treatment without disrupting lives and becoming a financial hindrance.

name: MEDICAL INTELLIGENCE CO
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to sell medical goods. The company's marketplace offers hospital supplies, and medical products, enabling medical suppliers to connect with clinics.

name: MyHealthTeams
description: Developer of the patient social network platform in chronic health intended to help communities of people better manage conditions. The company's platform creates disease-specific social networks and helps to get referrals and share tips with other people who are personally facing chronic conditions, enabling patients to see around corners with access to medically-approved content, safe support, and connections to thousands of other patients going through the same thing.

name: Myndlift
description: Developer of a professional remote neurofeedback technology designed to improve cognitive abilities. The company's technology detects and measures brain wave activity to offer a set of mind-controlled gamified exercises that are based on an evidence-based technique, enabling healthcare professionals to help patients with ADHD to strengthen their concentration.

name: Naluri
description: Developer of a digital therapeutics platform designed to connect employees or policy-holders with health psychologists. The company's platform combines behavioral science, data science, and digital design, as well as offers coaching to lose weight and helps organizations predict, prevent, and manage the leading cardiometabolic and mental health conditions, enabling users to achieve and sustain health outcomes such as better stress management, and reduction in blood pressure or blood sugar levels.

name: Neqabty
description: Developer of a mobile-based financial application designed to provide automated syndicate services. The company's application offers payment of service costs, medical services, and booking events and trips, enabling clients to pay for their medical applications such as prescriptions, renewals, and medical fees.

name: Niramai
description: Developer of a medical device designed to detect breast cancer at a much earlier stage than traditional methods or self-examination. The company's device uses an imaging method that is radiation-free, non-touch, not painful, works for women of all ages, and employs artificial intelligence and machine learning algorithms for early and accurate breast cancer screening, enabling healthcare practitioners to detect breast cancer for screening in rural and semi-urban areas.

name: Nonnatech
description: Developer of a device-agnostic platform designed for early detection of health conditions and pinpoints those who may be at risk of hospitalization. The company's platform aids in the early detection of physiological changes by utilizing data from FDA-approved devices, predictive analytics, and machine learning, enabling healthcare professionals to track and monitor the health conditions and physical changes of their patients.

name: Orderly Health
description: Developer of data management software designed to improve the accuracy of healthcare data. The company's software is a machine learning product that automatically identifies and repairs inaccuracies in healthcare provider directories, enabling all patients to have access to up-to-date, accurate information and reducing the cost and time burden on payers, plans, and administrators.

name: Plenna
description: Provider of health care services intended to provide comprehensive in-person and virtual care to middle-income women in Mexico. The company offers services related to gynecology, psychology, nutrition, laboratories and tests, vaccines and general medicine, enabling women to make timely and informed decisions about their sexual and reproductive life.

name: PontRX
description: PontRx enables provider-patient channel communication to save physician time and streamline access to care

name: Prescrypto
description: Developer of an electronic medical prescription platform designed to create and send medical prescriptions online. The company's platform offers built-in catalogs of medicines with photos, streamlines the process of prescription, manages the medical recipe and uses blockchain technologies to prevent drug trafficking, enabling medical practitioners to analyze medications and track, generate and audit medical prescriptions in a consolidated and secure data repository.

name: Proteinea
description: Developer of a biotechnology platform intended to integrate biology with engineering and molecular sciences to make protein therapeutics. The company's platform provides traceable, recycled food such as fruits, vegetables, and grains to feed the insects and aims to replace fish meal in aquaculture and animal feed with sustainable alternatives, enabling customers to access an environmentally responsible approach, reduce the volume in landfills while delivering high-quality nutrients for animal and pet food.

name: Reliv
description: Developer of healthcare management platform designed to integrate doctors, patients, insurance, and pharmacies. The company's platform offers appointment management, calendar management, automatic reminder, electronic billing, cloud clinical history, and inventory management, enabling users to gain access to a simple and seamless interaction.

name: Sapiens Medicus
description: Esculapio is your 24/7 voice‑first full-stack AI doctor that offers you personalized care.

name: Scape
description: B2B2C wellness tech marketplace in Latin America (soon US)

name: Simpatico Project
description: Operator of a B2B mental healthcare platform intended to target the demand for psychological counseling from B2B customers and establish a healthy psychological counseling culture. The company develops a psychological counseling program optimized for the issues faced by executives and employees of companies and organizations in each field, such as executives of large corporations, lawyers and firefighters, enabling employees to match professional counselors in each field to provide corporate counseling through artificial intelligence.

name: Sira Medical
description: Developer of augmented reality software designed to help clinicians with pre-surgical planning, training, and education. The company's software helps clinicians display imaging to patients in a way that is clear and understandable, enabling healthcare professionals to view human anatomy in a completely new way.

name: Sonar Mental Health
description: Developer of digital health technology platform designed to catalyze the world's transition to precise, effective, and preventative mental healthcare. The company's platform identifies when youth are suffering in silence, notifies the adolescent and their parents/caregivers, counselor, or friends based on breadcrumbs left from online activity to facilitate support before a mental health crisis happens, allowing users to proactively measure, identify, and support youth mental health.

name: Stethy
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based healthcare software designed to improve compliance and reduce resourcing. The company's software uses artificial intelligence and machine learning algorithms that help the doctor to get a list of the symptoms and a proposed diagnosis before the patient walks into their treatment room and allow them to think and prepare what to ask, it automates data-heavy workflows within healthcare and the life sciences, enabling doctors and nurses to diagnose and treat patients effectively.

name: Surglasses
description: Developer of an augmented reality (AR) surgical navigation system designed to improve smart healthcare. The company's platform offers AR surgery for orthopedics and neurosurgery in high-performance surgical systems and educational products. enabling healthcare professionals to perform surgeries with precision and efficiency and advanced innovative products for medical education.

name: Svastia
description: Developer of a clinical-genomic platform intended to improve people's lives through precision medicines. The company's platform provides multi-omic analytics workflows and access to novel clinical genomic data to accelerate biomarker discovery and validation, enabling doctors to select the right therapy for patients or refer them to the right clinical trials using their genetic profiles.

name: Terapify
description: Operator of an online therapy platform intended for the Spanish-speaking market. The company's platform offers online psychotherapy sessions attended by clinical psychologists who provide counseling on topics that include anxiety, stress, depression, couple problems, self-esteem issues, personal development and sexuality, enabling users to connect with psychologists online to regain and maintain their emotional stability.

name: Thriva
description: Provider of preventative healthcare services intended to empower people to proactively manage their health. The company's services offer subscription-based insights to monitor and track cholesterol levels, vitamin-D deficiency, iron deficiency, and poor liver function, enabling customers to access affordable, clinical-grade information that reveals how their lifestyle is impacting their well-being.

name: Tunable Biosystems
description: Developer of ultrasound-adjustable sutures, allowing surgeons to modify soft tissue postoperatively in a non-invasive manner.

name: Valeo
description: Developer of personalized mobile health tracker designed to optimize health. The company's health tracker provides users with access and insight into their wellness data, consumers can purchase packages through the application, combining wellness tests and personalized advice from certified coaches, enabling users to track their health.

name: Verbal
description: Developer virtual care Artificial intelligence (AI) platform designed to help healthcare payers and providers to automate admin work, streamline quality assurance and level up care team performance. The company's platform analyzes audio from live calls and draws on organizational protocols to automate key administrative tasks and give care healthcare professionals real-time guidance on how best to respond and shortens the time to onboarding proficiency by providing real-time coaching during customer interactions, enabling medical professionals to focus on handling care management and drug safety.

name: Vivoo
description: Developer of a wellness application designed for personalized nutrition and lifestyle advice based on urine sample analysis. The company's application guides users to make healthier choices by tracking parameters such as vitamin C, magnesium, calcium, salinity, oxidative stress, hydration, ketones, and protein straight to their phone in seconds based on weekly at-home urine tests, enabling users to track and know their bodies and health conditions.

name: Voi
description: Operator of behavioral health and insights platform designed to help and intervene in people at risk of suicide and mental issues. The company's artificial Intelligence-powered platform provides feedback about imminent suicide risk in order for users to take the required action, enabling health professionals, hospitals, and families to assess risk as highly trained psychiatrists and provide detailed insights about the patient population.

name: Yoderm
description: Developer of an online platform for connecting patients with dermatologists. The company develops a platform that enables users to get online acne consultation from dermatologists.

name: Neutun
description: Developer of a novel tracking software designed to track epileptic events. The company's novel tracking software offers a pre existing wearable offers continuous passive tracking, medication reminders, notification and recording progress services, enabling epilepsy patients with a seizure tracking tool to track chronic and acute health conditions.

name: Health Co (Stealth)
description: Provider of massage therapy services. The company provides massage and wellness services to the customers at their own convenience.

name: Kindara
description: Developer of a fertility tracking application designed to revolutionize the women's health care industry. The company's application helps women to understand their cycle by tracking ovulation calendar and menstrual cycle tracker, empowering women to learn more about their bodies, enabling users to have earlier and better conversations about their fertility journey with their healthcare providers.

name: Humanco
description: Developer of an all-day activity tracking application. The company provides a mobile all-day activity tracker that motivates users to be more active and helps analyze and improve one's daily level of activity.

name: Gentem
description: Developer of a medical platform intended to help physicians with instant reimbursements. The company's offerings include connecting, processing and receiving payment for their claims, enabling medical practitioners to get their money without any administrative cost.

name: QueueDr
description: Developer of an appointment tracking application. The company allows doctors to fill openings in their schedule through the application, helping patients to book those openings.
